events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite Queen track featuring his unmistakable guitar work?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger! What's your ultimate Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV celebrates 45 years
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on this day in 1981, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star, or just make it even better?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking 32 years since its impact on Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994. Which track from that iconic album still gets you singing along?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the Woodstock Festival kicked off. Three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation. What's your favourite Woodstock moment?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Forty-nine years ago today, we lost the King. Remembering Elvis Presley and his unparalleled legacy in music. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tribute to Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Today, we remember Tupac Shakur, who was tragically shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and passed away six days later on September 13th.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur. His music continues to resonate decades later.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on
events.blurb: On September 18, 1970, the world lost a guitar legend, Jimi Hendrix, marking 56 years since his untimely passing.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago today, we said goodbye to Jimi Hendrix. His innovative guitar playing still inspires generations. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: Beatles' 'Abbey Road' 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, an album that would become their final recorded work together.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969. That cover, those songs... pure magic. Which track is your go-to?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incomparable Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude have inspired so many. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK in 1975, making it 51 years since its powerful message resonated across the airwaves.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-one years ago, John Lennon's 'Imagine' single was released in the UK. A timeless call for peace that still matters today.

events.title: The first iPod: 25 years since its debut
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first iPod on October 23, 2001, changing how we listen to music forever, marking its 25th anniversary.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? Apple released it on October 23, 2001, changing music consumption forever. What was the first song you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day: 64 years of 007
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962, marking 64 years of the iconic spy.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' hit cinemas. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today, born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of John Lennon. His music and message live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! A true titan of British comedy. What's your favourite of his iconic roles?

events.title: Beatles' 'White Album' 58th anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968, marking 58 years since its debut.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 58 years since The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album' on November 22, 1968. A sprawling masterpiece with so many unforgettable tracks. Which one's your favourite?
